description_long: This is a compact, two-seater chaise with a gently curved backrest and rounded armrests on both sides, giving it a classic and inviting appearance. The upholstery is a smooth, solid dark gray material, likely faux leather or vinyl, with no visible patterns or tufting. The seat is wide and flat, seamlessly integrated with the backrest and armrests, providing a unified and comfortable sitting area. The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, finished in a dark color, and positioned at each corner for stability. The overall silhouette is soft and rounded, with a modern yet timeless design suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or waiting areas. The chaise appears sturdy and well-padded, offering both comfort and durability for public or semi-public environments.
description: A compact, dark gray two-seater chaise with rounded armrests, a smooth curved backrest, and short tapered legs, featuring a solid, seamless upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the curved backrest, rounded armrests, and wide seat.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the short, straight leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous curve of the backrest and both armrests, with the back legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and leg design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, gently curved, and seamlessly integrated with the armrests, creating a continuous, soft silhouette with no visible segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, rounded and padded, extending from the seat to the top of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, likely made of wood or metal with a dark finish, and are positioned at each corner for stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark gray with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, integrated seat cushion that spans the width of the chaise, with no separate or loose cushions visible; the backrest and armrests are also padded and seamlessly connected.
